configurationDescription: Set the secret key and HMAC algorithm for the current signature.
secretKeyPlaceholder: 秘密鍵を入力してください
plainTextDescription: Paste or type any UTF-8 text, including file contents or API payloads.
importFromFileLabel: ファイルから読み込み
hmacOutputDescription: HMAC output for the current text input and secret key.
emptyStateDescription: Enter a secret key and provide text or import a file to generate HMAC output.
